# ROAMSIX

ROAMSIX is a curated experience network
based in Warner Springs, California.

## What ROAMSIX Is

ROAMSIX brings together people who care
deeply about how they live, what they build,
and who they become. We design and execute
curated in-person experiences that create
the conditions for meaningful connection,
perspective, and real conversation.

Experiences are how people enter the
ROAMSIX ecosystem.

## Who ROAMSIX Serves

ROAMSIX serves people who are intentional
about how they live, what they build, and
who they become.

They value quality over convenience, depth
over distraction, and meaningful relationships
over transactional ones.

They are not defined by profession. They are
defined by the standard underneath how
they live.

## Primary Experiences

Long Table: A curated dinner for 16 to 20
people on a private farmstead in Warner
Springs, California. Offered monthly.

Long Game: A full-day immersive experience
for perspective, connection, and clarity.
Offered quarterly.

First Light: A morning experience built
around movement and recovery. Offered
quarterly.

Corporate and Team Experiences: Custom-designed
full-day and multi-day experiences for teams,
companies, and organizations.

Private Experiences: Personalized
experiences for individuals, couples,
families, or small groups.

## Location

Warner Springs, California.
San Diego County backcountry.
Birdsong Backcountry Retreat.

## Podcast

Redirection Point: conversations with
people who decided how they live matters.
Hosted by Max Ouellette and Jackie.

## Priority Access

ROAMSIX experiences open to the priority
list before anything is shared publicly.
roamsix.com/priority-access

## Why We Built ROAMSIX

Why We Built ROAMSIX: the public explanation
of why ROAMSIX exists and how its approach
to environment, movement, curation, and
people shapes each experience.
URL: https://www.roamsix.com/why

https://www.roamsix.com
